generated_oml:
instance BCSSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control Systems providing real-time physical building data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData BCSSensorData
]

instance BCSSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensor
]

instance RealTimePhysicalBuildingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from physical building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData BCSSensorData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataSynchronizationEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric BIM representation with semantic data for Building Control Systems components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEEnabler
]

instance MDEEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for transforming enriched BIM models into structured representations and generating deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinService
]

instance DataSynchronizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Continuous data exchange capabilities for synchronizing physical and digital systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinService
]

instance CustomAnalyticsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modular architecture supporting custom analytics services for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables DigitalTwinService
]

instance DigitalTwinService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital Twin services providing real-time monitoring, predictive analytics, and decision support for building operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight, PredictiveInsight, DecisionSupportInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time operational status of building systems for facility managers"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Forecasted system behavior and potential issues for proactive maintenance"
]

instance DecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Actionable insights for optimizing building operations and resource allocation"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "AECO domain building asset for digital twin representation"
    base:contains BCSSensor, BIMModel, DigitalTwinService
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and leverages Unreal Engine for rich, interactive visualization, featuring standardized extension points to enable modular, service-oriented DT platforms."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The lifecycle stages commence with device modeling in BIM environment where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation. This is followed by Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) principles for extracting structured representations and automatic generation of deployable DT artifacts. The runtime phase includes real-time data exchange for continuous synchronization, interactive visualization for monitoring and control, and modular architecture enabling evolution through custom services and analytics integration."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Model-driven deployment framework with modular architecture and standardized extension points enables scalable integration of custom services; runtime configuration management allows dynamic adjustments without full redeployment, supporting scalability from individual components to enterprise-wide systems."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework implements standardized extension points within its modular architecture to ensure interoperability and seamless integration of custom services and analytics. However, no specific industry standards (e.g., ISO, IFC) or compliance frameworks are explicitly referenced in the document."
]
